_meta.description: STAIR sub-dimension readiness scores for Moodle 5.2dev+ (Build: 20260320)
_meta.source: Source code analysis of github.com/moodle/moodle main branch

1.1_Event_Coverage.evidence: 228 core event classes with LEVEL_PARTICIPATING/TEACHING/OTHER classification in lib/classes/event/

1.2_Observer_Subscription.evidence: Internal observers via db/events.php, no external streaming API

1.3_SRL_Phase_Observability.evidence: Performance phase strong (quiz attempts, submissions), Forethought phase weak (no goal-setting events)

1.4_Real_Time_External_Access.evidence: Log store polling only via mdl_logstore_standard_log, no WebSocket/streaming

1.5_Event_Enrichment.evidence: Context hierarchy (system/course/module), other[] field, but no prior-state capture

2.1_Raw_Data_Availability.evidence: Grades, completion, competencies, event logs all queryable

2.2_Analytics_Framework.evidence: 8 prediction targets, ML pipeline with Python backend, time-splitting strategies

2.3_Unified_Learner_Model.evidence: Data scattered across mdl_grade_grades, mdl_course_modules_completion, mdl_competency — no unified API

2.4_API_Query_Capability.evidence: 402 web service functions, token auth, REST/SOAP

2.5_Temporal_Analytics.evidence: Time-splitting strategies exist in analytics framework, no real-time session tracking

2.6_Privacy_Aware_Access.evidence: Role-based access via capabilities system, no fine-grained agent consent model

3.1_AI_Subsystem_Infrastructure.evidence: 6 providers (openai, azureai, awsbedrock, gemini, deepseek, ollama), 4 action types, but user-initiated only

3.2_Agent_Identity_Model.evidence: No agent role in capabilities system, no agent-specific permissions

3.3_Reasoning_Pipeline.evidence: No planner, no goal-setting for agents, no reasoning chain

3.4_AI_Analytics_Bridge.evidence: Zero cross-imports between core_ai (ai/) and core_analytics (analytics/) — verified by grep

3.5_Write_Back_Capability.evidence: Web services exist for grades, messages, calendar but no agent-specific write API

3.6_SRL_Detection_Logic.evidence: Dropout prediction exists in analytics targets, no SRL phase detection

3.7_Contextual_Adaptation.evidence: Placements (courseassist, editor) exist but no learner-context adaptation

4.1_Agent_Registry.evidence: No multi-agent registry or agent discovery mechanism

4.2_Shared_State_Store.evidence: No shared agent memory or coordination state

4.4_Conflict_Resolution.evidence: No priority or conflict management for competing agents

4.5_Scalability_Architecture.evidence: Task system (scheduled + ad-hoc) can queue work but not agent-aware

5.1_Message_Delivery.evidence: Messaging API and notification system exist, but no agent-specific channel

5.2_UI_Injection.evidence: Output renderers, blocks, but no real-time content injection

5.3_Content_Generation.evidence: AI generate_text/generate_image exist, not connected to intervention pipeline

5.4_Feedback_Loop.evidence: Grade feedback exists, but no intervention tracking or outcome measurement

5.5_Timing_Intelligence.evidence: No optimal-timing engine, no engagement-aware scheduling
